options: Keep billing as the canonical domain name and treat invoices as subdomain language.
Rename the domain to invoices in a later migration wave.
open_decisions.impact: Affects route names, feature names, docs, and task sequencing.

options: Keep existing [id] params and document entity meaning in features.
Rename to expressive params such as [wrapId] and [bookingId] during WAVE-01.
open_decisions.impact: Affects route files, links, fetchers, and tests.
